programmes.show_name: Classic Who Wants To Be A Millionaire
programmes.show_description: A classic episode of the award-winning quiz show presented by Chris Tarrant in which contestants can win up to one million pounds.
Bradley Walsh hosts the game show that asks contestants to complete a series of general knowledge questions faster than The Chaser. (S7, ep 109)

Warwick Davis hosts the game show where 10 is the magic number as contestants put their general knowledge to the test for a £125,000 jackpot prize. (S1, ep 10)
Nigel Havers hosts as five dealers battle to buy quirky items brought in by the public, from a model plane to a transforming table and a ride-on whale. (S4, ep 23)
Antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson travels the country, team in tow, hoping to snap up some good deals. But will the locals take the cash for their antiques or gamble at auction?
Two families play against each other in the big money survey-based gameshow presented by Les Dennis. (S10, ep 8)
With the help of a celebrity panel, contestants must fill in the missing words of statements and phrases. Lily Savage hosts this classic game show.

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Who Wants To Be A Millionaire
